description_long: This object is a modern electric fan with three wide, flat blades radiating from a central hub. The blades are evenly spaced and have a slightly angular, aerodynamic design, likely made from lightweight metal or durable plastic. The central housing is cylindrical and robust, suggesting it contains the motor and internal wiring, and it extends downward into a conical mounting base. The entire fan is finished in a uniform dark color, giving it a sleek and minimalist appearance. There is no visible blade guard, exposing the blades fully, which is typical for ceiling-mounted fans in urban interiors or sheltered outdoor spaces. No power cord or control panel is visible, indicating that controls may be integrated into the mounting or operated remotely.
description: A sleek, dark-colored ceiling-mounted electric fan with three wide, flat blades and a cylindrical central housing. The design is minimalist, with no visible blade guard or control panel.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the three evenly spaced blades radiating from the central hub.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical central housing and the conical mounting base, with all three blades visible.
description_view_2: Angled view from above, displaying the blade arrangement and the central hub's connection to the mounting base.
description_view_3: Direct side view focusing on the conical mounting base and the central hub, with the blades extending outward.
attribute_blade_guard_design: No blade guard is present; the blades are fully exposed with no mesh or grille structure.
